Spray Cooling Fan, 2023 New Portable Water Air-conditioning Fan, Cute USB Fan Portable Air Conditioner Humidifier Fan Desk for Desk Room Bedroom Office Dorm Turbo (Yellow)

About this item
【 Spray Cooling Fan】It does not contain harmful refrigerant, nor does it use a compressor like a conventional power consuming air conditioner.Evaporative Air Cooler is a personal, eco-friendly design that pulls warm air from,room through its evaporative water filter to humidify.
【Three Gear Adjustment】Three optional wind speeds (low/medium/high), which can be adjusted freely according to your needs, so that it can cool the surrounding area evenly and efficiently, creating a larger comfort zone, allowing you to enjoy a cool summer day.
【USB Charging】The cooler has a built-in battery that can be carried anywhere and charged using a type-c cable.Works via any USB power supply. It can be run by using a laptop, a power bank or a wall outlet.
【Portable & Convenient】Personal space cooler Let you enjoy cool, clean at home or away Lightweight and portable for Indoor/outdoor use. You just need to pack the tank with water and ice , then plug it into a power source and enjoy refreshing, cool air!
【Easy to Use】 Just pour water in the top filled tank, adjust the direction of the raster as you wish, and enjoy. Enjoy cool wind anywhere with this wind cooler that helps turn hot, dry wind into cold, refreshing wind.Water air-conditioning fan, USB fan,desktop turbo spray humidification cooler.
